economic_notes: First Nation holds 8.3% interest in Keseechiwan Holdings LP and FHQTC Developments LP. Owns 100% of New Horizon First Nations Administration Inc., Nekaneet Management Ltd., Nekaneet First Nation Investment Holdings Ltd., and Nekaneet Holdings GP Ltd. Holds 6,666,666 units in Gensource Potash Corp at cost $1,000,000 (market $666,667). Gas Station and Convenience Store capital project funded by ISC $1,000,000 in progress.
notes: Comparative 2023 figures restated per Note 27. Consolidation includes Nekaneet First Nation Operations and CMHC Housing Fund; four GBEs accounted for under modified equity method (New Horizon First Nations Administration Inc., Nekaneet First Nation Investment Holdings Ltd., Nekaneet Management Ltd., Nekaneet Holdings GP Ltd.) plus two limited partnerships (Keseechiwan Holdings LP, FHQTC Developments LP). Portfolio investment in Gensource Potash Corp carried at lower of cost or market ($666,667 vs cost $1,000,000) with accumulated remeasurement loss of $333,333. OSR is negative because deferral of unexpended funding ($-2,297,557) offsets other own-source items. Long-term debt note shows 2023 comparative of $5,257,052 but balance sheet shows $4,957,052 - possible typo in notes. ISC $1,000,000 Gas Station funding received but remains as unexpended revenue (receivable from ISC at year end). Schedule of remuneration not included in extracted text.
